summary: Iteration 59 - Data Audit Validation Complete. All 3 P0 fixes verified: (1) No departed members with billing_enabled=True, (2) All DUO members have bidirectional duo_partner_id links, (3) Payments aligned with schedules including 0 CHF offerts. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All KPIs and member stats correctly displayed.
critical_code_review_comments: payments.py: Lines 61-152 sync_payments_with_members now correctly creates 0 CHF payments for offert members with status='paid'
payments.py: Lines 318-405 generate_monthly_payments includes offerts with auto-paid status
members.py: Lines 103-171 get_member_stats correctly deduplicates and counts active_members=93, active_coaches=29, departed=195
members.py: Lines 202-214 get_member enriches DUO member detail with duo_partner_name
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 validated all 3 P0 data audit fixes: (1) BILLING FIX: 11 departed members + Alexandra Dankova now have billing_enabled=False - verified via GET /api/members filtering by exit_date < today; (2) DUO FIX: All 18 DUO couples have bidirectional duo_partner_id links - GET /api/members/{id} shows duo_partner_name enrichment; (3) PAYMENTS FIX: Payment schedules count=91, offert members have 0 CHF payments with status='paid'. Dashboard shows correct KPIs: 93 membres actifs, 29 coachs actifs, 4 expirés, 195 partis.

all_duo_have_partner_id.evidence: 0 orphaned DUO members (all have duo_partner_id set)

duo_links_bidirectional.evidence: All DUO partner links are bidirectional

offert_payments_0_chf_paid.evidence: Offert members have payments with amount=0 and status='paid'

payments_sync_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/payments/sync-with-members creates schedules and payments including offerts

generate_monthly_payments.evidence: POST /api/payments/generate/2026/3 includes offerts with auto-paid status

dashboard_kpis.evidence: Dashboard shows 93 membres actifs, 29 coachs actifs

members_page_stats.evidence: Members page shows correct stats: 93 active, 29 coaches, 4 expired, 195 departed

duo_ui_display.evidence: DUO members show DUO badge and PARTENAIRE badge for partners
